Thus will you become a true friend of th: You pick up the Dryad's gift of a Magic Acorn.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 你拿起樹精贈與的魔法橡實。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You drop the seed into the Dryad's limbs.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 你把種子掉進樹精的枝幹中。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: Until you have done so, you are only intruding on my concentration.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「在你完成之前,你只是在打擾我的冥想。」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: That acorn tasted awfully bitter... just like an ordinary acorn.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 那顆橡實嚐起來苦得要命…就像一顆普通的橡實。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You find an ordinary acorn on the ground.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 你在地上找到一顆普通的橡實。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You dare to harm the Dryad of the forest!  You must be made less dangerous.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「你竟敢傷害森林的樹精!你必須變得不那麼危險。」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: Heed now my words, friend of the forest, and heed them well.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「現在就要聽我的話,森林的朋友,要聽清楚。」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: Friend, you must know that there is an evil in this valley which perverts the ways of nature.  The prophecy says that a hero will bring a young human from out of this darkness.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「朋友,你必須知道這個山谷裡有一股邪惡之力,它扭曲了自然的秩序。預言說會有一位英雄將一個年輕的人類從黑暗中拯救出來。」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: If you are the one to accomplish this task, there is a potion to break enchantments which the Healer can make for you.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「如果你能完成這項任務,治療師可以為你製作一個解除魔法的藥水。」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You must gather these ingredients:
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「你必須收集這些材料:」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: Flowers from Erana's Peace,
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「伊瑞娜的安寧之地的花朵,」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: Green Fur,
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「綠色的毛皮,」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: Fairy Dust,
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「妖精之塵,」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: a Magic Acorn,
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「一個魔法橡實,」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: and Flying Water.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「和飛行之水。」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: Farewell, friend.  I must return to my concentration.  May the forest forever surround you.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「再見了,朋友。我必須回去冥想。願森林永遠環繞著你。」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You follow the stag into this forest corner.  You feel as though the eyes of the forest are watching you.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 你跟著白鹿進入森林的角落。你感覺彷彿整個森林的眼睛都在注視著你。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: What a beautiful animal!
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 多麼美麗的動物!

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You need to become a friend of the forest.  Harm not the gentle creatures or plants.  See with all your senses the magic of the trees and wild places.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「你需要成為森林的朋友。不要傷害溫和的生物或植物。用你所有的感官去感受樹木和野生地方的魔法。」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: Wander and learn.  Then you too will be in harmony with the forest.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「漫步其中吧,並學習。然後你也會與森林和諧相處。」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: Give the seed to me.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「把種子給我。」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: Now this will boldly grow where none has grown before!
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「現在它將大膽地在無人種植過的地方生長!」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You have destroyed the plant that was to be preserved!
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「你摧毀了本應被保護的植物!」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: As you have destroyed, so shall you now become!
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「正如你所摧毀的,你現在也將變成這樣!」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You have attempted to harm a free creature of the forest!
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「你試圖傷害森林的自由生物!」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You shall now become a part of the forest!
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「你現在將成為森林的一部分!」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You have misused your skills, oh Magician!  You have used the Flame Dart on my forest.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「你濫用了你的技能,哦,法師!你在我的森林上使用了火焰鏢。」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You must be made less dangerous.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「你必須變得不那麼危險。」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You are forced to confess that you lied to the Dryad.  You don't have the magic seed.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 你被迫承認你對樹精撒謊了。你沒有魔法種子。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: It's not nice to fool Mother Nature.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「欺騙大自然是不禮貌的。」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You tell the Dryad: "No amount of persuasion could convince the flowers to relinquish their seed easily, so I was forced to hack my way to the seed with my weapon."
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 你告訴樹精:「無論多少勸說都無法輕易說服花朵放棄它們的種子,所以我被迫用武器砍出一條路到達種子。」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You pick it up and eat it.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 你拿起它並吃了它。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: The acorn appears too ordinary.  You drop it back on the ground.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 那顆橡實看起來太普通了。你把它掉回地上。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: I detect that you have in your possession such a seed.  Are you willing to give me the seed?
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「我發現你擁有這樣一顆種子。你願意把種子給我嗎?」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: Have you brought the seed I requested?
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「你帶來我要求的種子了嗎?」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: Well, Hero-to-be!  Are you yet a friend of the woods?
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 「好吧,未來的英雄!你是森林的朋友嗎?」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: The tree-woman speaks:  "I am the Dryad, keeper of the woods.  Are you one with the woods?"
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 樹精女人說:「我是樹精,森林的守護者。你與森林為一體嗎?」

Thus will you become a true friend of th: Again, you feel a sense of closeness with nature.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 你再次感到與自然相近的感覺。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You know you will sleep comfortably and well in this quiet and protected corner of the woods.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 你知道在森林的這個安靜而受保護的角落,你會舒服地安睡。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: The stag is startled by your action.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 白鹿被你的行動嚇到了。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You watch the stag, fascinated with his grace and beauty.  There is something special about this place.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 你看著白鹿,被它的優雅和美麗迷住了。這個地方有什麼特別的。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: The oak tree radiates magic.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 橡樹散發出魔法。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: The Dryad radiates magic.

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You can feel a gentle breeze wafting its way between the woods.  The scent of fresh flowers and green growing things fills you with a sense of peace.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 你可以感覺到微風輕輕吹過森林。新鮮花朵和綠色植物的香氣充滿了你,讓你感到平靜。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You are in a strange and beautiful part of the forest.  There is something special about this place.

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You see thick brush, rocks, and heavy woods to the north.

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You sense a certain magic about the huge oak tree that dominates the clearing.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 你感受到主宰空地的巨大橡樹散發的某種魔法。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: That was interesting, but there's nothing here to open.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 那是有趣的,但這裡沒有什麼可以打開的。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: The rocks are much to heavy to move.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 岩石太重了,無法移動。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: The rocks to the north look steep.  There is a rock wall northeast of the large oak tree.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 北邊的岩石看起來很陡峭。大橡樹的東北邊有一面岩壁。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: Don't be ridiculous; you can't talk to a rock.  Try the trees instead.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 別傻了;你不能跟一塊岩石說話。試著跟樹說話吧。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: The stag looks more surprised than injured.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 白鹿看起來更驚訝而不是受傷。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: He's beyond your reach.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 他超出你的範圍。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: The majestic white stag is an outstanding example of the beauty of the animal kingdom.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 莊嚴的白鹿是動物王國美麗的傑出典範。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You seem to have startled the white stag.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 你似乎嚇到了白鹿。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: The beautiful white stag is foraging for food.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 美麗的白鹿正在覓食。

「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 太晚了!

Thus will you become a true friend of th: There's no time for that!

Thus will you become a true friend of th: Your spell has no effect.

Thus will you become a true friend of th: The beautiful white stag is foraging for food.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 美麗的白鹿正在覓食。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: The white stag takes a mighty leap.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 白鹿縱身一躍。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: The stag looks more surprised than injured.

「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 厚重的荊棘灌木叢封住了南邊的路。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: This man looks very tough.  From his clothing, you guess him to be a member of the Thieves' Guild.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 這個人看起來非常硬漢。從他的衣著,你猜測他是盜賊公會的一員。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: Like a floral alliance of the Mason-Dixon and Maginot lines, a row of bushes prevent you from moving south.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 就像梅森-迪克森線和馬其諾防線的花卉聯盟,一排灌木叢阻止了你向南移動。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: The hollow log looks somberly back with it's single giant eye, and you know at once that nothing is to be gained by investigating this gaunt relic of a more vertical past.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 空心木頭用它唯一的巨大眼睛陰沉地看著,你立刻知道調查這個更垂直過去的瘦弱遺跡沒有任何收穫。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: Besides that huge hollow log, there's nothing particularly special about this part of the forest (unless you count the sound of rushing water to the east).
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 除了那個巨大的空心木頭,這部分森林沒有什麼特別的地方(除非你算上東邊湍急的水聲)。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: The water seems to be trying to fly as it leaps from the mountain above.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 水似乎在從上面的山上躍下時試圖飛起。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: A river plunges for more than a hundred feet down the face of a cliff.  You see slick, vertical cliff walls.  A doorway has been built into the side of the cliff.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 一條河流從懸崖面上垂直落下超過百英尺。你看到光滑的、垂直的懸崖牆。一扇門已經被建造在懸崖的一側。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: The grass is green with the freshness of spring.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 草地是春天的新鮮的綠色。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: The door is built into the face of the mountainside.  You suspect that the person who lives behind it treasures privacy.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 門被建造在山邊的表面。你懷疑住在它後面的人珍視隱私。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: It's a large door.  It must open pretty wide.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 這是一扇大門。它一定開得相當寬。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: It's a little hard to knock on the door from where you're standing.

Thus will you become a true friend of th: The door is so securely locked that it defies your abilities to unlock it. (You might have had an easier time if it had a keyhole.)
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 門鎖得非常牢固,超出了你的解鎖能力。(如果它有鑰匙孔,你可能會容易得多。)

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You can't do that from here.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 你不能從這裡做那個。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You're too close to throw a rock.

Thus will you become a true friend of th: It's an iridescently shimmering magical ladder!
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 這是一個虹彩閃爍的魔法梯子!

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You don't see a ladder here.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 你在這裡看不到梯子。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: There is a narrow ledge in front of the wide door.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 寬門前有一個狹窄的岩架。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You don't have an empty flask.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 你沒有空的瓶子。

「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 水優雅地流向鏡面湖。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: You already have some.  Don't be greedy.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 你已經有一些了。不要貪心。

「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 你的瓶子已經充滿了水。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: The rocks are too slick from the spray of the waterfall for your limited climbing skill.
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 由於瀑布的噴霧,岩石太光滑了,超出了你有限的攀爬技能。

Thus will you become a true friend of th: Flat... you feel very, very flat.

Wow!
「這樣你就會成為森林的真正朋友。」: 哇!

Thus will you become a true friend of th: Wheeee!
